properties.body:
EASTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
SCOTLAND-WEST COAST.
HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS.
DNC 19.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 1000Z TO 1900Z DAILY
   07 THRU 11 JUN WITHIN 32 MILES OF
   57-41.6N 009-02.4W. VESSELS INTENDING
   TO ENTER AREA SHOULD CONTACT
   HEBRIDES RANGE CONTROL ON VHF CH 16 OR
   PHONE: 187 060 4449 FOR ADVICE.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 112000Z JUN 16.
